typescript.console.helpful.0: It looks like you're logging to the console! Remember to remove debug logs before shipping to production.
typescript.console.helpful.1: I see a console statement! Consider using a proper logging library for production code - it'll give you log levels and better formatting.

typescript.console.helpful.3: I noticed you're using console. Did you know console.group() can help organize related logs together?
typescript.console.helpful.4: It looks like you're debugging! console.trace() can show you the full call stack if you need to track down where something was called from.
